# Basic Feature Example

## Overview

This is a basic test fixture for testing spec parsing and loading.

## User Stories

### US1: Basic Functionality

As a user, I want to test basic spec loading so that I can verify the parser works correctly.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Spec file can be loaded
- [ ] YAML frontmatter is parsed correctly
- [ ] Content is extracted properly
